title: Extract Email Addresses from a String
scenario: Write a prompt that extracts all email addresses from a given string. The input string may contain multiple email addresses separated by commas, spaces, or other characters. The output should be a list of extracted email addresses. The LLM should handle different email formats and ignore any invalid email addresses. The input string is: 'john.doe@example.com, jane.doe@example.com, 123@example.com, invalid_email'.
constraints: Must be under 50 lines of code

evaluationCriteria.description: The code should be syntactically correct and valid Python code.
The code should adhere to the constraints provided (Python solution and under 50 lines of code).
The code should correctly extract all email addresses from the input string.
